facts.title: Long Live The Thuzad <3
The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
Your future self is watching you right now through memories.
Every map is a picture of someone else's adventure.
Silence is a sound too, just a very patient one.
Passwords are just modern spells we forget how to cast.
Night exists so the sky can show off the stars.
A bookmark is a promise to return.
Coffee is just bean soup we agreed to romanticize.
The internet is a library where half the books are on fire and still useful.
Clocks don't tell time. They tell agreements.
Every draft is a finished idea wearing work clothes.
Rain is the sky doing laundry.
Shadows are proof that light was here.
A good playlist can turn a hallway into a movie scene.
Keys are tiny trust tokens we carry in our pockets.
Tomorrow is just today's unfinished sentence.
Mirrors are honest only when the lights are.
Socks disappear because laundry is a portal, not a machine.
Every offline moment is a soft reboot for the brain.
Streetlights are night's way of saying I got you.
Notifications are digital knocks on a door that never closes.
A blank page is not empty. It is patient.
Echoes are sound remembering where it has been.
Winter teaches trees that rest is productive.
Headphones are portable walls for noisy worlds.
Fireworks are stars with a shorter attention span.
The moon is Earth's longest-running night light.
Handshakes are software updates for trust.
Old photos are time travel with better lighting.
A saved draft is hope with a filename.
Sidewalk chalk is temporary rebellion against concrete.
Libraries are free multiplayer servers for imagination.
Sunsets are daily reminders that endings can be beautiful.
Your favorite mug knows more about your mornings than most people.
Wi-Fi is a ghost that only engineers can see clearly.
Maps used to be art before they became apps.
Dreams are nightly open beta tests for the impossible.
A well-placed comma can save a whole relationship in a text.
Thunder is clouds arguing and then making up with rain.
